basic_details.job_title: IIMA Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA) Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIMA. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIMA Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in economics, urban planning, or business administration with significant coursework in econometrics and/or data analytics. Expertise in Stata/R required.
qualification.details: Master's degree in economics (MSc/MA or similar), or urban planning (MCP/Master of Planning or similar), or business administration (MBA or similar) with significant coursework/concentration in econometrics and/or data analytics. Courses in urban economics, urban development, land use planning, transportation planning/policy or related subjects. Good grades in undergraduate and postgraduate courses in statistics, econometrics, and microeconomics. Expertise in Stata/R required. Expertise in GIS is a plus. Excellent communication skills (both written and oral).

vacancy_details.Post Name: Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIMA Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIMA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIMA Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy post at IIMA is 15th June 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in economics, urban planning, or business administration, with a strong focus on econometrics and/or data analytics. Proficiency in Stata/R is essential, and GIS expertise is considered a plus.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy position at IIMA primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contract basis for the role of Research Associate.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy at the Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates are required to submit their applications through the official website of IIMA.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIMA offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details for this particular recruitment. It is advisable to check the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key skills required for this position?
faq.answer: Key skills include expertise in Stata/R, strong analytical abilities, and excellent written and oral communication skills. Knowledge of econometrics and data analytics is also crucial.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please ensure you visit these links for accurate and up-to-date information.
